name: Dimensional Weight Divisors by Carrier
description: Volumetric (DIM) divisors used to convert shipment volume to billable weight. NOT in the knowledge base; the corpus only defines the concept (volume / minimum density requirement). Candidate values below are common industry figures and MUST be confirmed against current carrier rate cards before use.
review_frequency: quarterly (carriers revise divisors, often at annual GRI)
source: TO CONFIRM: UPS, FedEx, DHL published rate/service guides; IATA TACT for air.
sourcing_notes: Confirm each divisor and its unit against the carrier's current service guide. Divisors change (e.g. US domestic parcel moved 194 -> 166 -> 139 in^3/lb historically). Record effective_date per carrier and set status to verified once confirmed. Note whether the divisor applies to all packages or only above a size threshold.
